ham.subject: Your Weekly Marketing Update – New Products & Exclusive Offers
ham.body:
Hello Team,

We are excited to share this week’s highlights:

- **New Product Launch**: Our latest smart thermostat now supports voice control.
- **Customer Loyalty Program**: Earn double points on all purchases made before Friday.
- **Upcoming Webinar**: Join us on Tuesday, 15th May, at 10:00 AM to learn about our sustainability initiatives.

Thank you for your continued support. Please feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback.

Best regards,
Marketing Operations

---
Marketing Operations Team
1234 Innovation Drive
Cityville, ST 56789

spam.subject: Urgent: Your University Scholarship Application Requires Immediate Action
spam.body:
Dear Applicant,

This is the University Scholarship Office at XYZ University. We have reviewed your scholarship application and are pleased to offer you a provisional award of $15,000. However, to confirm your enrollment, we require a processing fee of $150 to secure your place.

Please complete the payment by <URL> within 48 hours. Failure to do so will result in the automatic cancellation of your scholarship and your application will no longer be considered for the upcoming academic year.

If you have any questions, contact us immediately at scholarshipoffice@xyz.edu.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Dr. Jane Smith
Director, Scholarship Office
XYZ University
